alert: Points are awarded to the company the user is assigned to (has a company account linked to their profile)! If you report a bug using an employee account, the points will go to the company account. If you don’t have a company account, points will not be awarded.
bug1:
Minor bugs - {{points}} points
For fixes that don’t significantly affect the website’s functionality but are still worth reporting!
bug2:
Medium bugs - {{points}} points
Issues that make it harder to use certain features.
bug3:
Major bugs - {{points}} points
Report critical problems that affect the entire site’s functionality!
description: Found a bug on our platform? Report it and earn points! 🏆</br>Each report gives you a chance to win rewards - the more serious the bug, the more points you can get! Here's how it works:
noData: You haven’t reported any bugs yet.
subject: Your report will help us improve the platform, and you’ll have a chance to earn extra points. 🚀 We’re waiting for your submissions!
title: Reported platform bugs assigned to the company account
